name: extrator-receita
description: Ferramentas para ingestao e analise de arquivos CNPJ da Receita Federal

scripts.db:import:drop-indexes: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d DealRadar -f scripts/sql/01-import-drop-secondary-indexes.sql
scripts.db:import:create-indexes: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d DealRadar -f scripts/sql/02-import-create-secondary-indexes.sql
scripts.db:import:analyze: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d DealRadar -f scripts/sql/03-import-analyze.sql
scripts.db:metrics: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d DealRadar -c "SELECT now() AS ts, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, buffers_checkpoint, buffers_backend, buffers_alloc FROM pg_stat_bgwriter;"
